title: Grindstone critic verdict: triage, not a grade. The agentic critic ROUTES one task to PASS (merge), RETRY (the bounded same-worker retry), or ESCALATE (the planner). Lenient on purpose, the old rigid multi-field schema is what a weak model fumbled. Pydantic (grindstone.contracts.models.Verdict) is the source of truth.

outcome.description: PASS merges (notes carry forward); RETRY is a defect the same worker can plausibly fix; ESCALATE routes anything the worker cannot fix (missing dep, ambiguous spec, a decision, environmental) to the planner.

reason.description: Free-text note behind the triage. Unbounded: the verdict is delivered to the planner by reference (read from its persisted file), never byte-capped into a prompt.
